flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Porter & Chester Institute of Hamden fell 42% between 2021 and 2024 (52.3% → 30.3%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Porter & Chester Institute of Hamden rose 24% between 2017 and 2020 ($10.0k → $12.3k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 20 pp at Porter & Chester Institute of Hamden vs the 2003–2007 baseline (43.2% vs 63.5%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Porter & Chester Institute of Hamden fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (7.3% → 0.0%).
